decks.notes: The deck focuses on utilizing reanimation spells like Persist to bring back powerful creatures with abilities that can quickly overwhelm the opponent, such as Archon of Cruelty and Scion of Draco. Leyline cards and Leyline Binding help control the board while setting up for combo plays. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Faithless Looting and Aurora Awakener to help filter through the deck and find key pieces. The goal is to assemble a lethal board state quickly and efficiently, putting pressure on the opponent to respond or face defeat.

The main focus of this Grixis Control deck is to control the game through a combination of counterspells, removal spells like Fatal Push and Consuming Corruption, and powerful card advantage engines like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Wan Shi Tong, Librarian. The deck aims to maintain control of the board while disrupting the opponent's game plan and accumulating card advantage to pull ahead in the late game. By efficiently answering threats and generating value through card draw and manipulation, Grixis Control seeks to out-grind and outlast opponents in a long game.

The deck focuses on quickly establishing a board presence with cheap artifacts and creatures, using cards like Mox Opal and Mishra's Bauble to ramp up mana. Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Pinnacle Emissary provide value through recursion and card draw, while Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke offer removal and disrupt opponent's strategies. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays and efficient use of artifacts, utilizing affinity synergy to generate advantage on the battlefield. Urza's Saga and Weapons Manufacturing provide additional value and threats, making the deck a formidable Aggro-Affinity archetype in Modern 1 vs 1.

The key theme of this UrzaTron control deck is to utilize the powerful Urza lands (Urza's Mine, Urza's Tower, Urza's Power Plant) to generate a large amount of colorless mana and cast big Eldrazi creatures and control spells. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategies by using counterspells, removal, and Karn, the Great Creator's ability to shut down artifacts. By controlling the board and overwhelming the opponent with large threats like Thought-Knot Seer and Ugin, Eye of the Storms, the deck seeks to dominate the game and secure victory.

This deck focuses on aggressive gameplay with a mix of disruptive elements to disrupt the opponent's strategy. It aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures like Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, while also using cards like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Quantum Riddler to control the board. Consign to Memory and Galvanic Discharge provide additional removal options, while Ephemerate and Solitude offer protection and versatility. The deck also utilizes cards like Teferi, Time Raveler and Arena of Glory to disrupt the opponent's tempo and ensure a swift victory.

This deck focuses on aggressive strategies while disrupting your opponent's game plan with cards that disrupt their resources and tempo. The key idea is to quickly put pressure on the opponent while also disrupting their ability to respond effectively. The deck includes a mix of efficient threats like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and powerful disruptive spells like Teferi, Time Raveler. By combining aggressive creatures with disruptive spells, the deck aims to control the game and create a winning position through a combination of aggression and disruption.

The main focus of this Dimir Control deck is to disrupt and control the opponent's game plan through countering spells, removing threats, and denying resources. The deck aims to establish control through a combination of countermagic, removal spells, and card advantage engines. With a mix of disruption and card advantage, the deck seeks to out-value the opponent and grind out a win. Sheoldred's Edicts and Wan Shi Tong, Librarian provide additional control elements while Consult the Star Charts helps dig for key cards. The deck also utilizes land destruction with Field of Ruin to disrupt the opponent's mana base.

This deck aims to generate a large amount of mana quickly through rituals and spells like Pyretic Ritual and Manamorphose, while reducing the cost of spells with Ruby Medallion. It also focuses on card draw and selection to find combo pieces with cards like Glimpse the Impossible and Reckless Impulse. The deck utilizes the graveyard with Past in Flames to cast spells multiple times. Ral, Monsoon Mage provides a win condition by dealing direct damage to the opponent. Wish allows for additional versatility and flexibility in finding the necessary cards to assemble the combo.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on utilizing powerful creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls to quickly apply pressure on the opponent. It also features support cards like Arena of Glory and Goblin Bombardment to control the battlefield and deal direct damage. The deck emphasizes aggression and tempo, aiming to overwhelm the opponent with a mix of fast creatures and removal spells. By efficiently utilizing mana and maximizing creature effectiveness, the deck aims to maintain board presence and close out games quickly before the opponent can establish their own strategy.

The main concept of this Modern 1 vs 1 Aggro - Merfolk deck is to quickly establish a board presence with powerful Merfolk creatures like Lord of Atlantis and Master of the Pearl Trident, while disrupting your opponent's strategy with cards like Harbinger of the Seas and Flare of Denial. The deck also utilizes Aether Vial to cheat in creatures, as well as Cavern of Souls to ensure your Merfolk spells can't be countered. By leveraging the synergy between Merfolk lords and disruptive spells, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure a quick victory.

This deck focuses on utilizing cards like Indomitable Creativity and Leyline Binding to create powerful combos that can quickly overwhelm opponents. By combining various spells and creatures, the deck seeks to create a unique and creative way to win the game. The inclusion of cards like Wrenn and Six, Teferi, Time Raveler, and Archon of Cruelty provide additional control and disruption to help secure victory. Overall, the deck emphasizes the importance of strategic thinking and innovative plays to outmaneuver opponents in a Modern 1 vs 1 format.

This deck focuses on using Indomitable Creativity to cheat in powerful creatures like Archon of Cruelty while utilizing Leyline Binding to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes cards like Fable of the Mirror-Breaker and Pawpatch Formation to generate additional value and resources. Teferi, Time Raveler and Wrenn and Six provide additional control and recursion options, allowing the deck to outmaneuver its opponents. Overall, the deck aims to win through a combination of powerful combo plays and creative deck building choices.

The deck focuses on controlling the board and disrupting the opponent's strategy through counterspells, removal spells, and card draw. It aims to slow down the game and outvalue the opponent by maintaining card advantage and efficiently answering threats. The inclusion of Kaheera as a companion offers additional utility and synergy with the deck's creatures. Overall, the key concept of this UW Control deck is to manipulate the game to its advantage, consistently staying ahead of the opponent in both card advantage and board presence.

The deck focuses on ramping up quickly with mana accelerants like Utopia Sprawl and Eldrazi Temple, while controlling the board with Eldrazi creatures like Sire of Seven Deaths and World Breaker. Emrakul, the Promised End provides a powerful finisher. Cards like Kozilek's Command and Malevolent Rumble offer removal and disruption, while cards like Ugin, the Eye of the Storms provide additional control. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful Eldrazi threats and disrupt their game plan, ultimately winning through sheer advantage and powerful late-game plays.

This deck aims to quickly mill the opponent's deck by disrupting their resources and consistently milling cards from their library. By using cards like Hedron Crab, Ruin Crab, and Fractured Sanity, the goal is to force the opponent to draw out while also having cards like Archive Trap and Surgical Extraction to remove key cards from their library. The inclusion of counterspells like Drown in the Loch and removal spells like Fatal Push helps to control the board and protect the combo. The deck also includes draw spells like Visions of Beyond and Tasha's Hideous Laughter to keep the engine running smoothly.

This deck aims to aggressively disrupt opponents' game plans while applying pressure with creatures. By using cards like Ephemerate and Flickerwisp to repeatedly blink creatures, it can control the board while also generating card advantage. Thoughtseize and Fatal Push help to disrupt the opponent's strategy, while powerful creatures like Emperor of Bones and Overlord of the Balemurk quickly close out games. Teferi, Time Raveler provides additional disruption and protection, making it difficult for the opponent to stabilize. Overall, the deck aims to disrupt, control, and aggro its way to victory.
